title: Report on the proposed subsidy to The Auckland Project by Durham County Council
body: "The Subsidy Advice Unit (SAU) has published its report providing advice to Durham County Council concerning the proposed subsidy to The Auckland Project.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of Durham County Council’s assessment of compliance of the proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to The Auckland Project by Durham County Council case page. "
